Package com.shaft.mcp

package com.shaft.mcp
  • Class
    Description
    BrowserService
     
    BrowserType
    Supported browser types for SHAFT WebDriver initialization.
    CaptureService
    MCP adapter for deterministic managed-browser SHAFT Capture recording.
    CaptureService.CaptureCodegenStartRequest
    Structured request fields for the Playwright-codegen-compatible MCP start tool.
    DoctorService
    MCP adapter for deterministic SHAFT Doctor analysis with optional configured provider advisory.
    ElementService
    MCP-safe element actions.
    EngineService
     
    GuideService
    Searches the live official SHAFT user guide for MCP agents before they write SHAFT code.
    HealerService
    MCP healer loop for guarded SHAFT/Selenium reruns and review-only repair suggestions.
    locatorStrategy
    Locator strategies for finding elements on a web page.
    McpActionRecord
    Actionable remediation item returned by MCP analysis.
    McpActionRecord.Status
    Action status.
    McpAnalysisReport
    Local-stdio MCP report for failed Allure analysis and remediation snippets.
    McpAnalysisReport.Status
    Report status.
    McpAndroidEmulatorProposal
    User-confirmable Android emulator provisioning proposal.
    McpCaptureReplayResult
    MCP result for Capture generation, replay, and reusable code snippets.
    McpCodeBlock
    Safe copy-paste code block returned by local MCP remediation tools.
    McpCodeBlock.Kind
    Code block type.
    McpCodeGuardrailResult
    Result of checking generated or agent-authored code against SHAFT MCP guardrails.
    McpCodeGuardrailViolation
    Code guardrail finding returned to MCP clients.
    McpGuideMatch
    One official SHAFT user-guide match returned by shaft_guide_search.
    McpGuideSearchResult
    Official SHAFT user-guide search result for MCP agents.
    McpHealerAttemptResult
    One guarded rerun attempt made by the MCP healer.
    McpHealerRunResult
    MCP healer result for guarded Selenium/SHAFT test reruns and review-only fixes.
    McpHealerRunResult.Status
    Overall healer status.
    McpMobileAccessibilityTree
    Mobile accessibility tree or current Appium page source returned for MCP inspection.
    McpMobileActionResult
    Mobile action result returned by MCP mobile tools.
    McpMobileContextSnapshot
    Current Appium context state for native, hybrid, or mobile web sessions.
    McpMobileDevice
    Mobile device discovered by local platform tooling.
    McpMobileInspectorPlan
    Confirmation-ready plan for a wrapped Appium Inspector recording session.
    McpMobileInspectorRecordingStatus
    Runtime status for a wrapped Appium Inspector recording session.
    McpMobileRecordedAction
    Persisted MCP mobile action for deterministic replay generation.
    McpMobileRecording
    Persisted MCP mobile action recording.
    McpMobileRecordingStatus
    Status for MCP mobile action recording.
    McpMobileReplayResult
    Result for MCP mobile recording code generation or replay.
    McpMobileSessionResult
    Mobile session setup result returned by MCP mobile tools.
    McpMobileToolchainStatus
    Local mobile toolchain discovery status.
    McpNaturalActionResult
    Result metadata returned after a trust-gated natural action.
    McpPageDomSnapshot
    Browser DOM snapshot returned by the MCP browser inspection tools.
    McpProviderFallback
    Safe provider metadata for optional AI fallback.
    McpScenarioCatalogResult
    Scenario catalog response returned to MCP clients.
    McpScreenshotResult
    Browser screenshot payload returned by the MCP browser inspection tools.
    McpTestAutomationScenario
    Test automation use case returned by the MCP scenario catalog.
    MobileService
    MCP tools for mobile web emulation, Appium native sessions, and SHAFT touch actions.
    NaturalActionService
    MCP entry point for trust-gated SHAFT natural-language actions.
    PlaywrightService
    MCP-safe Playwright tools backed by SHAFT.GUI.Playwright.
    ShaftMcpApplication
     
    TestAutomationService
    MCP tools that describe SHAFT test-automation agent workflows and validate generated code guardrails.
